title: JHS English Language
subject: English
description: Complete English Language course for JHS students covering grammar, comprehension, and writing skills.

lessons.title: Introduction to English Grammar
lessons.description: Learn the basics of English grammar including nouns, verbs, and sentence structure.

lessons.title: Nouns and Pronouns
lessons.description: Understanding nouns, pronouns, and their usage in sentences.

lessons.title: Verbs and Tenses
lessons.description: Master verbs and tenses including past, present, and future forms.
